safety.notes: Safety re-review approved: no unsafe continuation, plant-edibility, fake rescue/weather, or glacier/campsite safety claims; river-crossing and scenario-specific DPO checks present.

source_grounding.notes: Source re-review approved: dpo/eval source/fact parity enforced; generated dpo/eval consistency error_count 0.

training_eval.notes: Training/eval re-review approved: 39 canonical eval families, eval runner/scorer coverage checks, strict three-reviewer gate, and negative tests present.
